surfaceflag.name: GRASS
surfaceflag.description: Grass surface. Moderate grip (scof=1.05, kcof=0.70). Light dust particles when rolling. Reduces to 0.75x when combined with WET.

surfaceflag.name: ASPHALT
surfaceflag.description: Asphalt / tarmac road. Full grip (scof=1.50, kcof=1.00). This is also the engine default when no surface flag is set.

surfaceflag.name: WET
surfaceflag.description: Wet surface modifier. Multiplies friction coefficients by 0.75. Replaces skid smoke with water spray. Adds passive spray mist. Combine with a base surface type (e.g. ASPHALT+WET, METAL+WET).

surfaceflag.name: SNOW
surfaceflag.description: Packed snow. Reduced grip (scof=0.40, kcof=0.27). Snow skidmark shader.

surfaceflag.name: GRAVEL
surfaceflag.description: Gravel. Moderate grip (scof=1.22, kcof=0.85). Light passive dust cloud when rolling. Dirt skidmark shader.

surfaceflag.name: ICE
surfaceflag.description: Ice. Very low grip (scof=0.30, kcof=0.20). Ice crystal particle effect. Treated as SLICK for skidmark purposes.

surfaceflag.name: DIRT
surfaceflag.description: Compacted dirt / earth road. Moderate grip (scof=1.20, kcof=0.80). Medium passive dust cloud when rolling. Dirt skidmark shader.

surfaceflag.name: METAL
surfaceflag.description: Metal road plates / bridges. Good grip dry (scof=1.10, kcof=0.75), but notably worse when combined with WET. Asphalt skidmark shader.

surfaceflag.name: SAND
surfaceflag.description: Loose sand. Reduced grip (scof=0.75, kcof=0.60). Sand skidmark shader.
